productDisplayName: Skechers Men Valence Envoy Black Shoe
description: Walk the world in style and comfort with the skechers Valence-Envoy shoe. Replete with a classic look and a high traction sole, it's a shoe that helps you create a style statement of your own.Upper Smooth leather upper with a polished look Refined sporty yet casual lace up Layered overlay detail on toe, sides and heel Textile overlay detailing on side stripe with perforations for breathability Lace up front for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for all day comfort Soft fabric shoe lining Midsole Cushioned Relaxed Step comfort insole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole Flexible rubber traction outsole with lugs for excellent grip on rough terrain Shoe careUse a dry brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather polish
